metadata.name: Clinical Guidelines Knowledge Base
metadata.description: Comprehensive clinical practice guidelines organized into tiered PDF library, enriched JSON extractions, DOCX summaries, and specialized reference collections. All PDF folders fully audited. 1,547 articles in DB with 100% codon coverage. 404 PDFs in library.

01_pdf_guideline_library.description: Tiered PDF library organized by processing status and VC-citation tier. All folders audited.

00_non-codon.description: Processing backlog: 146 codon-named PDFs awaiting pipeline. Subfolders (has_extraction, needs_review, unexamined) all EMPTY.

02_codon.description: VC-cited articles. All 70 content-verified against DB records.

naming_conventions: Codon: Author_Year#@#ART-XXXX@#@.pdf (100% of library uses this format)

02_docx_guideline_library.description: DOCX summary documents generated by pipeline. Includes standard summaries, merged variants, and DB-only variants.
02_docx_guideline_library.notes: Mix of build_summary.js outputs, build_merged_docx.js outputs, and build_db_docx.js outputs.

03_enriched_JSON.description: Extracted and enriched JSON files from v4 pipeline

raw_txt.description: Full extracted text for each PDF

03_enriched_JSON.notes: Filenames use slugified titles, NOT codon format. 14 of the ART-1398–1425 articles have orphaned outputs here under old names.

05_scripts.description: Download and cleanup scripts for PDF acquisition

alt_refs.description: Specialized reference collections for clinical point-of-care and emergency support

bedside.description: Point-of-care acute decision support organized by syndrome

lookup_strategies: Strategy 0: codon_filename — parse ART-ID from #@#ART-XXXX@#@ in filename
Strategy 1: clean_ref — exact match on source.clean_ref field

ite_intelligence_db.purpose: Links clinical guidelines to ITE exam questions via ART-ID lookup
ite_intelligence_db.recent_changes: 123 new articles this session (ART-1426–1548), 6 re-IDed mismatches (ART-1444–1449)
